title: stelis stigmatosa
intro: Stelis stigmatosa, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever and inflammation, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Stelis stigmatosa include its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Stelis stigmatosa typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's roots and leaves, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to the skin.
